recommendations.title: The Avengers
recommendations.overview: When an unexpected enemy emerges and threatens global safety and security, Nick Fury, director of the international peacekeeping agency known as S.H.I.E.L.D., finds himself in need of a team to pull the world back from the brink of disaster. Spanning

recommendations.title: Much Ado About Nothing
recommendations.overview: A modern retelling of Shakespeare's classic comedy about two pairs of lovers with different takes on romance and a way with words.

recommendations.title: Avengers: Age of Ultron
recommendations.overview: When Tony Stark tries to jumpstart a dormant peacekeeping program, things go awry and Earth’s Mightiest Heroes are put to the ultimate test as the fate of the planet hangs in the balance. As the villainous Ultron emerges, it is up to The Avengers to

recommendations.title: Star Trek Beyond
recommendations.overview: The USS Enterprise crew explores the furthest reaches of uncharted space, where they encounter a mysterious new enemy who puts them and everything the Federation stands for to the test.

recommendations.title: The Lost World
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Fantasy, Drama, Romance, Horror, Science Fiction, Thriller
recommendations.overview: The first film adaptation of Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's classic novel about a land where prehistoric creatures still roam.

recommendations.title: Books of Blood
recommendations.overview: A journey into uncharted and forbidden territory through three tales tangled in space and time.

recommendations.title: The Sea Beast
recommendations.overview: When a young girl stows away on the ship of a legendary sea monster hunter, they launch an epic journey into uncharted waters — and make history to boot.

recommendations.title: Star Trek: Generations
recommendations.overview: Captain Jean-Luc Picard and the crew of the Enterprise-D find themselves at odds with the renegade scientist Soran who is destroying entire star systems. Only one man can help Picard stop Soran's scheme...and he's been dead for seventy-eight years.

recommendations.title: Megalodon Rising
recommendations.overview: When history’s greatest aquatic predator returns, the armada of modern warships sent to destroy it has no chance at all.

recommendations.title: Star Trek: First Contact
